name: vendor.myndhyve.ads-copy-generate
description: MyndHyve ads.copy.generate — AI-powered multi-variant ad copy generation with per-placement adaptation (truncation to caller-supplied text limits). Routes the AI call through ctx.callAI; replaces the source PlatformSpecRegistry read with caller-supplied inputs.placementTextLimits (resolve upstream from vendor.myndhyve.ads-platforms OR host.adPlatformSpecs).
author: MyndHyve
